summary: Post-generation polish converting the plan scaffold into fixture-only/read-only commands with local JSON fixtures, explicit no-live-auth status, and accounting-provider safety notes.
description: Post-generation polish converting the plan scaffold into fixture-only/read-only commands with local JSON fixtures, explicit no-live-auth status, and accounting-provider safety notes.
